# How to bring visitors back to your site automatically (Free tool)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-29 15:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 969

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever publish a blog post or announce a sale, and feel like hardly
anyone sees it?

Getting people to visit your site is hard enough. But getting
them to come back when you have something new to share? That’s
even harder.

Repeat visitors are more likely to engage, buy, and become loyal
fans. But if there’s no direct way to reach them, you’re missing
out.

That’s where PushEngage ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.JOaX7zHp9i1dBHTYe67jzg3lkRRT6rC-glpR87Ez3Z8 ) comes in.
It lets you send clickable messages straight to your visitors’
browsers, even when they’re not on your site.

And there's a powerful FREE plan to help you get started.

You can use PushEngage to:

✅ Share new blog posts or tutorials
✅ Announce product launches, discounts, or sales
✅ Automatically bring visitors back to your site - no extra
effort

It works on all major browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari),
takes just minutes to set up, and doesn’t require any coding.

I use PushEngage on WPBeginner, and the engagement is
consistently strong. It’s one of the best ways I’ve found to
increase repeat traffic.

If you want an easy, effective way to stay connected with your
audience, this is a tool I highly recommend.

👉 Start Sending Push Notifications for Free 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.JOaX7zHp9i1dBHTYe67jzg3lkRRT6rC-glpR87Ez3Z8 ) 👈

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
